faqs.question: What spider species are most common in Malverne homes?
faqs.answer: Malverne homeowners typically encounter house spiders, cellar spiders (daddy longlegs), wolf spiders, and occasionally sac spiders. While most are harmless, they can reproduce quickly and create unsightly webs. Our treatments target all common species and their egg sacs to prevent recurrence.

faqs.question: How much does spider control cost in Malverne?
faqs.answer: Our spider control services in Malverne range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and treatment plan needed. This includes thorough inspection, interior and exterior treatment, web removal, and follow-up prevention recommendations.

faqs.question: Are your spider control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are highly effective against spiders while remaining safe for children and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians follow strict safety protocols and can discuss all treatment methods with you before beginning service.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide spider control service in Malverne?
faqs.answer: We typically offer same-day or next-day service for Malverne residents. After treatment, you'll notice a significant reduction in spider activity within 24-48 hours, with continued improvement over the following week as our barrier protection takes full effect.
